events.name: Golden State Warriors at Charlotte Hornets

headlines.description: — Stephen Curry scored 26 points in his annual homecoming game in Charlotte, and the Golden State Warriors defeated the Hornets 132-125 on Wednesday in front of 19,685, the largest crowd ever at the Spectrum Center.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stephen Curry scores 26 in annual homecoming game as Warriors top Hornets 132-125

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Atlanta Hawks: Game Highlights) 2025/12/31 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jalen Johnson scored 34 points and the Atlanta Hawks overcame Anthony Edwards' 30 points for Minnesota to beat the Timberwolves 126-102 on Wednesday and end a seven-game losing streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Johnson scores 34 points as Hawks roll past Timberwolves 126-102 to end 7-game losing streak

headlines.description: — Donovan Mitchell scored 34 points, Darius Garland added 19 and the Cleveland Cavaliers pulled away in the fourth quarter to defeat the Phoenix Suns 129-113 on Wednesday to snap their four-game winning streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Donovan Mitchell scores 34 points to propel Cavaliers to 129-113 victory over Suns

events.name: New Orleans Pelicans at Chicago Bulls

headlines.description: — Isaac Okoro scored a season-high 24 points, Tre Jones added 20 points and 12 assists and the depleted Chicago Bulls topped the New Orleans Pelicans 134-118 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Okoro's season-high 24 points lead short-handed Bulls past Pelicans 134-118

highlights.description: Denver Nuggets vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights

headlines.description: — Peyton Watson scored 24 points, Jamal Murray had 21 and the Denver Nuggets won their first game without injured center Nikola Jokic, beating the Toronto Raptors 106-103 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Watson scores 24 points as Nuggets hold off Raptors to win 106-103 without the injured Jokic
